title: I Wasn't Allowed Prompting ChatGPT During My Chalk Talk: This Is Discrimination (2025)
summary: The author argues that prohibiting the use of AI tools like ChatGPT during academic presentations (e.g., chalk talks) constitutes discrimination against neurodivergent individuals and those with disabilities. The piece critiques institutional policies that ban real-time AI assistance, framing them as ableist and out of step with inclusive practices.
